text: Ever feel like a fraud? You're not alone. The imposter phenomenon affects high achievers who doubt their success. It can lead to anxiety, stress, and even burnout. But why? Studies show it's linked to personality traits and social dynamics. Understanding this can be the key to overcoming self-doubt. Curious about how to tackle your own doubts? Comment below!
